name: Local Inference
description: Unified Eliza-1 local inference provider — text generation, embeddings, voice (TTS/ASR), and image description via the elizaOS llama.cpp fork. Replaces the deprecated plugin-local-ai / plugin-local-embedding pair.

MODELS_DIR.label: Models Dir
MODELS_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the directory where GGUF models are stored. Defaults to <stateDir>/models.

CACHE_DIR.label: Cache Dir
CACHE_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the cache directory for model assets (tokenizers, ONNX caches).

LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.help: Filename of the small local model (TEXT_SMALL handler).

LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.help: Filename of the large local model (TEXT_LARGE handler).

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Filename of the embedding model used for vector embeddings.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions the embedding model outputs.

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.label: CUDA Visible Devices
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.help: Set to restrict which CUDA-enabled GPUs the runtime sees (e.g. `0,1`).

ELIZA_LOCAL_LLAMA.label: AOSP FFI Loader
ELIZA_LOCAL_LLAMA.help: Set to `1` on Android (elizaOS build) to enable the in-process bun:ffi loader (libllama.so + libeliza-llama-shim.so) via the @elizaos/plugin-aosp-local-inference companion plugin.

ELIZA_MODEL.label: Eliza-1 Tier
ELIZA_MODEL.help: Select a published Eliza-1 fine-tune tier. The runtime auto-picks the right quant flavor (gguf/polarquant/fp8/bf16) for your detected GPU and pulls it from HuggingFace on first use.

options.label: Eliza-1 2B (mobile / entry)
options.description: Smallest/entry tier; fits Android/iOS on-device inference and 16 GB consumer GPUs at Q4_K_M.

options.label: Eliza-1 4B (16-24 GB GPU)
options.description: Desktop-tier fine-tune for everyday workstation use.

options.label: Eliza-1 9B (24-48 GB GPU)
options.description: Workstation-tier fine-tune; Q4_K_M for 16 GB cards, PolarQuant for 24+.

options.label: Eliza-1 27B (cloud / 48 GB+)
options.description: Cloud-tier fine-tune; Q6_K GGUF on RTX 5090, fp8/bf16 on H200/B200.
